# North-Brook Limited

> West Africa's premier onshore and offshore logistics partner, serving the oil & gas, mining, and marine sectors since 2014.

North-Brook Limited is a Ghanaian logistics company headquartered in Accra, Ghana. Founded in November 2014, the company provides total onshore and offshore logistics solutions to international energy operators across West Africa.

## Services

- **Ship Agency & Husbandry** — Single point of contact for every vessel call: port clearance, documentation, crew logistics, onboard provisioning
- **Sea Freight Forwarding** — FCL & LCL cargo movement, subsea campaign logistics, specialist equipment handling
- **Bunkering** — Marine fuel sourcing, quality control, offshore asset refuelling
- **Warehousing & Cargo Consolidation** — Bonded and non-bonded storage, inventory management, supply chain optimisation
- **Import & Export Documentation** — Permits, certificates of origin, dangerous goods declarations, regulatory compliance
- **Crew Management** — Visa and travel processing, accommodation, port formalities
- **Customs Clearance** — Documentation, duties, inspections, specialist classification
- **Haulage Services** — Heavy equipment transport, bulk material haulage, chemical consignment handling

## Key Facts

- Founded: November 2014
- Headquarters: No 12 Joseph Richard Asiedu St, Accra, Ghana
- Port: Port of Tema, Ghana
- Operations: 24/7 ops desk, response within 2 hours
- Safety Record: Zero Lost Time Injuries (LTIs) since 2014
- Classification Societies: ABS, ClassNK, DNV GL, Korean Register, Lloyd's Register, RINA (6 total)

## Major Clients & Partners

Saipem, Borr Drilling, Fugro, Eni, OSM Thome, Dolphin Geo Subsea, Cypress Energy, Safeen
